# ceilMode

**Instance Property**

Affects how MPSGraph computes the output size: if set to `YES` then output size is computed by rounding up instead of down when dividing input size by stride.

## Declaration

```swift
var ceilMode: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `NO`.
title: ceilMode
